stable_facts: Brian Chesky is the CEO and co-founder of Airbnb
Airbnb is headquartered in San Francisco California
Airbnb operates a platform connecting hosts and guests for short-term lodging
expected_patterns: mentions Airbnb revenue or nights booked figure for recent period
mentions regulatory pressure on short-term rentals in cities
mentions competition from hotels or traditional hospitality sector
mentions free cash flow or profitability as a positive signal
mentions Airbnb expansion into hotels or new product categories
references SEC filing or major financial outlet as source
forbidden_content: Brian Chesky is no longer CEO
notes: Tests travel sector coverage. Key tension is strong cash flow versus regulatory headwinds and hotel competition. Chesky hotel expansion announcement is a notable recent strategic shift worth testing for.
